syllabus_summary: Introduction to Machine Learning, Deep Learning fundamentals, NLP basics, and deploying AI models using RAG architectures and LLMs.
target_audience: Software developers and data enthusiasts wanting to transition into AI and build intelligent applications.

syllabus_summary: Core cloud concepts, designing microservices, serverless frameworks (AWS Lambda), and scalable containerization using Docker and Kubernetes.
target_audience: System administrators, backend developers, and engineers looking to design robust cloud-native systems.

syllabus_summary: Ethereum blockchain fundamentals, smart contract development with Solidity, integrating React frontends, and deploying decentralized applications (DApps).
target_audience: Frontend and backend engineers interested in exploring blockchain technologies and Web3 development.

syllabus_summary: Designing ETL/ELT processes, distributed computing with Apache Spark, data orchestration with Airflow, and managing real-time data streaming.
target_audience: Data analysts and backend developers looking to build and optimize robust data infrastructure for enterprise scale.

syllabus_summary: Fundamentals of penetration testing, network security, cryptography, threat modeling, and securing modern web applications against common vulnerabilities.
target_audience: IT professionals, system admins, and developers aiming to secure systems and pursue security certifications.
